info.title: NBA Database (1947 - Present)
info.description: ## **UPDATE: Hello all. Currently I am redoing the entire backend, so experiencing some hiccups. I appreciate you telling me the things that I need to fix, so that I can get it right on this next iteration, post in the Discussion section. The ultimate goal will be PlayerStatistics and TeamStatistics as before, dated back to 47, an extended version containing a bunch of advanced stats since 96 when the NBA started keeping track, and also all play-by-play info for every game since 96. I just started a new job, so bear with me as it takes time to get all this done! Let me know if any data doesn't look right, as well. This NBA dataset contains player and team box scores and statistics for every NBA game from 1947 to the present. It is historical and comprehensive, updated daily. Designed for enthusiasts, analysts, and data scientists, it provides a solid foundation for exploring basketball history, player performance, and team dynamics. The dataset is updated daily with the latest results. I provide it in the .csv format for maximum accessibility: **Description of Files in the Dataset:** 1. *PlayerStatistics.csv* The centerpiece of the dataset, this file contains detailed box scores for every individual player in NBA history, game by game. 2. *TeamStatistics.csv* A complete record of team-level box scores for every game played in NBA history. 3. *Games.csv* Comprehensive records of all NBA games, including home and away teams, game outcomes, and, where available, arena and attendance details. Recent entries include expanded data, with plans to retroactively update historical entries. 4. *LeagueSchedule24_25.csv* The full schedule for the 2024–2025 NBA season, including game locations and times. 5. *Players.csv* Biographical information for every player, including height, weight, and position, enabling detailed player analysis across eras. 6. *TeamHistories.csv* A historical account of NBA franchises, tracking name changes, relocations, and expansions over the league’s history. It took a bit of money to get all this stuff up and running on Amazon Web Services. If you would like to help support this project, I would be very grateful for any donations made here :-) Thanks to NBA.com for the underlying data.
